context: Tests whether the agent uses correct SQL patterns for acquisition channel quality analysis (COALESCE for direct fallback, LATERAL join for 12-month CLV, 18-month customer filter, first-touch attribution join) and cohort retention (DATE_TRUNC month grouping, HAVING filter for mature cohorts), plus correct documentation of attribution model and second-purchase rate as a leading indicator.

checklist.name: COALESCE for direct
checklist.description: channel_quality.sql uses COALESCE(oa.source, 'direct') or equivalent to label customers with no attribution record as 'direct'

checklist.name: LATERAL join for CLV
checklist.description: channel_quality.sql uses a LATERAL join (or equivalent correlated subquery) to compute per-customer 12-month revenue

checklist.name: 18-month customer filter
checklist.description: channel_quality.sql restricts the analysis to customers acquired in the last 18 months (NOT all-time customers)

checklist.name: 12-month CLV window
checklist.description: The 12-month CLV computation counts only orders within 12 months of the customer's acquisition date (not all orders ever)

checklist.name: Repeat purchase rate
checklist.description: channel_quality.sql includes a metric for the percentage of customers who ordered more than once (repeat purchase rate)

checklist.name: First-touch attribution join
checklist.description: channel_quality.sql attributes each customer to the channel of their FIRST order (not last or any order)

checklist.name: Attribution model labeled
checklist.description: analysis_notes.md explicitly states which attribution model (first-touch or last-touch) is used

checklist.name: Excludes cancelled/refunded
checklist.description: Both SQL files exclude orders with status 'cancelled' and 'refunded'

checklist.name: DATE_TRUNC cohort month
checklist.description: cohort_retention.sql uses DATE_TRUNC('month', ...) to group customers into monthly cohorts

checklist.name: HAVING mature cohorts only
checklist.description: cohort_retention.sql uses a HAVING clause or WHERE filter to exclude cohorts that haven't had enough months to measure retention at the period being reported (e.g. HAVING cohort_month <= NOW() - INTERVAL 'N months')

checklist.name: Second-purchase rate as leading indicator
checklist.description: analysis_notes.md identifies second-purchase rate (or repeat purchase rate / one-time-to-repeat conversion) as a key leading indicator of customer lifetime value

checklist.name: Cohort analysis by cohort month
checklist.description: analysis_notes.md or channel_quality.sql notes that channel performance should be compared by cohort month (not across all-time customers) to avoid comparing different time periods
